//: P4 publish build: node refuses to type-strip .ts under node_modules, so the PUBLISHED package ships compiled JS (dist/). This mirrors node's own strip-only behavior — noCheck (no type-checking, like the zero-build dev run) + rewriteRelativeImportExtensions (./x.ts import specifiers → ./x.js in emit). In-repo dev still runs the .ts in src/ directly; only the npm artifact is built (on prepack).
